overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through open prairie grassland toward a rural train station during golden hour. The character transitions from tall grass to a dirt trail, approaches a steam train and other riders, then dismounts near the station platform.

agents.ego_description: riding horse through tall grass toward a dirt trail

tall green prairie grass covering the ground
scattered wooden fence posts marking field boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character rides through an open prairie landscape with tall grass swaying in the wind. Rocky mountains rise in the distance under a partly cloudy sky during golden hour, with wooden fence posts visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail alongside railway tracks approaching station

events.description: steam locomotive becomes visible on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding horse along dirt trail parallel to train tracks, approaching the station

traditional wooden train station with platform and roof
wooden utility poles with crossbars running alongside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The horse transitions onto a dirt trail running parallel to railway tracks. A steam locomotive sits stationary on the tracks to the right, while a wooden station building approaches in the distance. The mountains shift to the left as the camera moves forward along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station platform with waiting riders

events.description: group of mounted riders comes into view near the station platform
character brings the horse to a stop and dismounts

agents.ego_description: approaching other riders at the station, slowing down, and dismounting the horse

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horseback gathered near the station platform, some stationary and others milling about
steam locomotive parked at the station with cars visible behind the engine

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the train station where other mounted riders are gathered near the platform. The station building now looms on the left as the camera passes by. The character slows the horse to a stop and dismounts near the group of riders and the parked steam train.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, wind-swept prairie toward the structured activity of a rural train station during the golden hour. It begins with the character riding through tall, swaying grass beside wooden fence posts, with rocky mountains framing the horizon under a partly cloudy sky. As the horse transitions onto a dirt trail, the landscape shifts to run parallel with railway tracks where a stationary steam locomotive appears to the right. The scene then opens up as the camera moves forward, bringing the wooden station building into view while the distant mountains drift to the left. Finally, the camera slows to a stop as the character arrives at the platform, passing the station building to dismount among a group of gathered riders beside the parked train.
